title: Delta update bundles: ship only changed files, not the full app
description: The portable update bundle (scripts/build-portable.mjs stageUpdateBundle) currently copies the entire app/ tree (incl. node_modules/electron/dist) + resources/ + update/, so the 0.0.2 update zip is nearly as large as the full ~398MB portable. Only engine/ and models/ are excluded (PRESERVE). Goal: make the update bundle a true delta — include only files whose SHA256 differs from (or are absent in) the from-version manifest, and populate manifest.delete[] for removed files. The applier (scripts/portable/apply-update.cjs) is ALREADY manifest-driven (copies only manifest.files[], deletes manifest.delete[], backs up to rollback dir) so it likely needs little/no change — the work is build-side. Reuse existing version-comparison machinery (js/managers/versioningManager.js semver/appVersionIntroduced logic; routes/engine.js GET /engine/version-check; dependencies.js dep hashes) where it fits. Parent: MPI-8 portable distribution. Blocks the MPI-8 update-flow test (deferred until delta lands).
